docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BREEDING, WOODROW AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR THEATER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALCAZAR THEATER HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERT MAIL TO OWNER ALCAZAR THEATER RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BREEDING, WOODROW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCAZAR THEATER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BREEDING, WOODROW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALCAZAR THEATER RES JUDICATA. ISSUES PREVIOUSLY IN SMALL CASE #738225 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF SEP-15-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALCAZAR THEATER
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-22-1994, GRANTED
